movie.actors: Dee Bradley Baker, Zach Tyler, Mae Whitman, Jack De Sena
movie.awards: Won 1 Primetime Emmy. Another 7 wins & 6 nominations.
movie.genre: Animation, Action, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Mystery
movie.plot: In a war-torn world of elemental magic, a young boy reawakens to undertake a dangerous mystic quest to fulfill his destiny as the Avatar, and bring peace to the world.
movie.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
